title: Rhythm Time Composer
prompt:
Create a production-ready Rhythm Time Composer using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Build an accessible appointment-time input with three compact selectable rhythm chips—Morning, Midday, and Evening—and a labelled native time field. Selecting a chip fills a deterministic example time and advances a violet tick along a horizontal schedule rail. Use a #F4F5F6 surround, white Bento panel, #ECECEE lines, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F help copy. Violet is the only bright accent and the card itself must not use a gradient.

Use native input semantics, a visible label, buttons with aria-pressed, and a polite live region that states the current time. Every chip must have a 44px target. Click, Enter, and Space must select the same rhythm. Hover lifts a chip 2px in 180ms and press compresses it 1px in 90ms. Move the tick with a stiffness 350, damping 29 spring and fade the helper copy over 160ms. Manual time edits must remain valid and not be overwritten unless the user picks a chip. Use only local state; no timers, storage, random data, remote assets, or network requests.

At 320px, wrap chips cleanly and keep the field full width. On wide previews, retain the compact composer instead of adding unrelated controls. Keep a logical focus order, 3px dark focus rings, AA contrast, and clear labels that do not rely on color. Prefer opacity and transform. Honor prefers-reduced-motion with an instant tick update or 120ms fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code and a pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML: <label>Choose a time <input class="uiwiki-rhythm" type="time" value="09:00"></label> */
.uiwiki-rhythm{display:block;min-height:48px;width:100%;margin-top:12px;padding:0 12px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;color:#111;font-weight:800}.uiwiki-rhythm:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}.uiwiki-rhythm+div{height:4px;margin-top:16px;border-radius:9px;background:#7c3aed}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-rhythm{transition:none}}
